---
title: "Wor Gems"
date: "2026-05-10"
description: "A WarPips-style auto-battler set 300 years after Gem in Eyes. Three factions, seven units, destructible cover, projectile combat. Pure HTML."
categories: [project, game, visualization]
path: /wor-gems.html
---

```{=html}
<p>Redirecting to <a href="/wor-gems.html" target="_blank" rel="noopener">the standalone page</a>…</p>
<script>window.location.replace("/wor-gems.html");</script>
```
